title: Paalam Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Paalam Kottu Kottu melam
Singer: Shankar Mahadhevan, Swheta Mohan
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Kaththi 

Kottu kottu melam kottu
kattu kattu paalam kattu
idhayatha idhayathukku
inaikka paalam kattu

Mars-la ivan porandha
venus-la iva porandha
grahanga renduthukkum
irukkum paalam

Sorgathula marameduththu
kattuna paalam thaan
muththathula katti vacha
paalam kadhal thaan.

Kadhal oru medhava medhava paalam
adhu illa nenjukulla mirugam mirugam vaadum

andakula adhipadhi neeye
namo namo naaraayanaaya
thondakulam pottrum unnaye
namo namo

Oh thunbam inga
oru karai thaan
inbam anga maru karaithaan
rendukkum maththiyila
odum paalam edhu

Kovilula kalleduththa
bhakthiyila solleduthu
kattina paalam idhu
saami paalam adhu.

Paavam senjaa karakaluva
ninaikkum boomithaan
paavaththa nee unarndhuputta
neeyum saamithaan

Saami oru
kurukku kurukku paalam
adhu illena
boomi ingae
kirukku kirukku kolam

humpy dumpy anga falling down
jack n jillu inga rolling down
londan bridge is ayyo fallingaaa
ringa ringa all fall down.

Neththu verum irul mayamthaan
naalai adhu olimayam thaan.
nalla oru edhirkaalathuthukku
pogum paalam edhu.

Kurumbula irumbeduthu
arivula narambeduthu
ezhuppunena paalam idhu
kulandha paalam

Vaanathula meen pidichu
rasikkum vayasuthaan
ellarukkum venum andha
kulandha manasuthaan

kulandhainga kanavu kanavu paalam
adhil ponaale kannu munne
oliyum olirum kaalam

Kuthukalle pole nindaane
puttukinu poyeputtaney
ettukaalu poochi aattamthaan
naasamaai nadandhu varaaaney

Porappudhum oru nodithaan
erappadhum oru nodithaan
sollladi niyanaponne
rendum paalam edhu

anju mootta pooveduthu
nerathula naar eduthu
kattuna paalam edhu
vaazhkka paalam adhu

paadhiyila mullirukkum
kuththuna kathaadhe
beer-adichi ninna kooda
adhuvum kuthaathe

vazhkka adhu
poovula kattuna paalam
nee sethaalum
seththu vecha puniyam
ennaikkum vaazhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Paalam?

The song Paalam conveys themes of love and connection, emphasizing the bonds that unite people.

What is the context of Paalam in the movie Kaththi?

In Kaththi, Paalam highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional journey.

Who are the singers of Paalam?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and Shweta Mohan.

Who composed the music for Paalam?

The music for Paalam was composed by Anirudh.

When was Paalam released?

Paalam was released on September 17, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paalam, the vibrant melodies and heartfelt lyrics encapsulate the essence of love and connection. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in Kaththi, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. With its upbeat rhythm and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. This duet not only showcases the chemistry between the singers but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paalam from Kaththi is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and connection. With Shankar Mahadevan and Shweta Mohan's captivating vocals, paired with Anirudh's infectious music, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with joy and celebration!
stanzaMeanings: The bridge is built with rhythm, connecting hearts and emotions.
He was born on Mars, she was born on Venus; there is a bridge for both planets.
The bridge in heaven is built with love, just like the one made with pearls.
Love is a wise thing; if not, it becomes a wild animal in the heart.
You are the supreme being; we bow to you, Narayana, and praise you.
Oh, here is a place of sorrow, but there is joy elsewhere; which bridge connects both?
In the temple, devotion is expressed; this is the bridge to God.
The poor earth thinks about the troubles; you too are a part of this.
God is a small bridge; without it, the earth is in chaos.
Humpy Dumpty fell down, Jack and Jill rolled down, London Bridge is falling down.
Yesterday was just darkness, tomorrow will be bright; this is the bridge to a good future.
This is the bridge of childhood, where wisdom is gained and knowledge is shared.
In the sky, fish are caught and enjoyed; everyone needs that childlike heart.
Children's dreams are like a bridge; when they go there, they see light and brightness.
Like a butterfly, you were born and flew away; the dance of the insects is now lost.
Every moment is a bridge, every ending is a bridge; tell me, what is this?
The five petals of the flower are gathered; this is the bridge of life.
In the middle, there are thorns; don't let them hurt you, stay with me.
This bridge of life will lead you to good deeds, even if you fall.
